summary: Iteration 2 — frontend-only verification of the Shree Food Junction rebrand + backend/Gemini removal. PASS: app.json name='Shree Food Junction' / slug='shree-food-junction' / android.permissions include BLUETOOTH/BLUETOOTH_CONNECT/BLUETOOTH_SCAN/ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION / ios.infoPlist NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription present; package.json has react-native-bluetooth-escpos-printer@^0.0.5; KITCHEN_NAME hardcoded to 'Shree Food Junction' in storage.ts; no /setup route, no Gemini/kitchen-name input anywhere in home or settings; first-launch correctly routes to /printer-setup; 'Demo mode' banner + 2 demo devices (DEMO-58-01, DEMO-POS-58) render; connect navigates to /home; home shows logo/brand-name/tagline; generate fires POST directly to https://expertdevelopers.in/generate-8858-quote-for-sfj (verified in network panel — NOT to Emergent backend); regenerate fires another POST; print-button shows preview-toast 'Printed (simulated). Build APK for real BT printing.'; settings shows brand card + connected demo printer; disconnect clears it; change-printer navigates to /printer-setup. External API direct curl OK: returns {success:true, quote:'...'}. ISSUES: (1) Web-preview CORS blocks the fetch so preview-quote renders 'Failed to fetch' in the browser — does NOT affect real device / Expo Go on phone / built APK; (2) Order number does not visually increment to #2 on /home after returning from /preview (state only refreshed on mount, not on focus). Deprecated packages: none. SafeAreaView issues detected: none.

ui_bugs.issue: Order number does not refresh from AsyncStorage when navigating back from /preview. After a print on #1, storage is updated to 2 (via preview.tsx onPrint), but home's useEffect runs only on first mount, so the stepper still shows '#1'. Need useFocusEffect from expo-router (or @react-navigation/native) to re-read getOrderNumber() each time home gains focus. Reference: /app/frontend/app/home.tsx:36-42

integration_issues.flow: Home → Preview quote fetch (WEB PREVIEW ONLY)
integration_issues.issue: Direct fetch to https://expertdevelopers.in/generate-8858-quote-for-sfj is blocked by browser CORS on the Expo web preview ('Access to fetch ... has been blocked by CORS policy'). The request DOES leave the page (verified in network panel) and the same endpoint returns 200 with a valid quote when called via curl — so this is purely a browser/web-preview constraint. On Expo Go (real phone) and the built APK, React Native's fetch does NOT enforce CORS, so the flow will work on the user's actual targets. To make the web preview fully testable, the user could ask the API owner to add 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' (and allow POST + Content-Type on preflight). No code change required for the mobile/APK deliverable.

issues: Cosmetic: console warns 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated' (use Pressable), 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' (use style.pointerEvents). No functional impact.

action_items: FIX (HIGH): In /app/frontend/app/home.tsx, replace the one-shot useEffect(..., []) with useFocusEffect(useCallback(() => { (async () => { const [n, p] = await Promise.all([getOrderNumber(), getPrinter()]); setOrder(n || 1); setPrinterState(p); })(); }, [])) so the order stepper refreshes to #2 after a successful print. Import from 'expo-router' (useFocusEffect) or '@react-navigation/native'.

INFO: CORS on web preview — preview-quote will display 'Failed to fetch' in the Expo web preview but the same flow works fine inside Expo Go on a phone and inside the built APK (React Native fetch has no CORS). Either (a) ask the API owner at expertdevelopers.in to add CORS headers for browser-based testing, or (b) accept that web preview cannot fully verify the quote text — verify on a phone via Expo Go QR or a Publish APK.

OPTIONAL polish: replace deprecated TouchableWithoutFeedback (home.tsx:77,182) with Pressable, replace shadow* style props with boxShadow (preview.tsx noteShadow), replace pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents on the preview toast.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/lib/api.ts: clean — direct POST to expertdevelopers.in, accepts both data.quote and data.data.quote, validates non-empty.

/app/frontend/src/lib/printer.ts: lazy require of react-native-bluetooth-escpos-printer with try/catch is correct — Expo Go falls back to simulated, built APK will auto-engage native BT once the library links at build time. Android 12+ runtime permission requests (BLUETOOTH_SCAN/BLUETOOTH_CONNECT/ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION) are in place.
/app/frontend/app.json: all four Bluetooth android.permissions + iOS NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription/NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription present — APK rebuild will gain real BT printing.
/app/frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: KITCHEN_NAME is a const ('Shree Food Junction'). No user-editable kitchen-name anywhere — matches spec.

Backend FastAPI is still running in /app/backend but is unreferenced by the frontend. Safe to leave or delete — not invoked anywhere from frontend source (grep confirms only api.ts, which hits expertdevelopers.in).

success_rate.frontend: 10/11 spec items PASS — only preview-quote rendering fails on web (CORS) and order increment doesn't refresh on focus

context_for_next_testing_agent: All verified testIDs: home-logo, home-brand-name, open-settings, printer-chip, change-printer, home-customer-input, order-increment/decrement, order-number-value, generate-button, printer-list, printer-card-DEMO-58-01, printer-card-DEMO-POS-58, printer-connect-DEMO-58-01, printer-skip, printer-back, printer-rescan, preview-back, preview-order, preview-quote (success state), preview-error (CORS state in web), preview-printer-hint, regenerate-button, print-button, preview-toast, settings-back, settings-printer-name, settings-change-printer, settings-disconnect. To re-test the order-increment fix: print on #1 → router.back() to /home → expect '#2'. To bypass web CORS for testing the quote render, run the Expo Go QR code on a real phone — fetch will succeed there. App name in app.json='Shree Food Junction', slug='shree-food-junction'. Bundle id in.expertdevelopers.shreefoodjunction.
rca_of_issue: RCA #1 (order doesn't increment on UI): home.tsx loads order via useEffect with empty deps; on `router.back()` from /preview, home is restored from the route stack rather than re-mounted, so the effect does not re-run, leaving `order` state at the value captured at first mount. Storage IS updated correctly inside preview.tsx onPrint (`await saveOrderNumber(Math.max(cur, orderNumber) + 1)`) — so this is purely a UI-refresh bug. Fix with useFocusEffect to re-read storage every time home gains focus. RCA #2 (CORS): browsers enforce CORS on cross-origin fetches; the SFJ quote endpoint does not return Access-Control-Allow-Origin, so the browser blocks the response. React Native (Expo Go phone + APK) does not enforce CORS, so this is web-preview-only. Mitigation: either ship CORS headers from the API or rely on phone/APK testing for the quote render.
